decision.rationale: The plate motion_plates/head-turn-06.png honors the identity rule IR.sean.motion.head-turn-9-frame-sequence. As frame 06 of the 9-frame sequence, it represents an intermediate rotation following the front-facing midpoint (frame 05). Any minor silhouette shift in the back-of-skull is within the permitted drift for intermediate frames (02-04 and 06-08) under the rule. The hair silhouette transitions consistently without introducing anomalous drift. Furthermore, the sequence maintains proper eye-lead timing, with the eyes opening and targeting the destination by frame 07, which is 2 frames before the head turn completes at the anchor pose in frame 09.
